title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India South Asia Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India South Asia Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
